meta.title: Knowledge Base | Honorary Consulate of Hungary — New England
meta.description: Guides on Hungarian document authentication, apostille, citizenship, and consular services for Hungarian-Americans in New England. Written by the Honorary Consul.

hero.headline: Answers Before the Appointment
hero.subheadline: Plain-English guides on Hungarian documents, authentication, citizenship, and what to expect — written by the people who answer your questions every week.

post.bookCtaNote: Have a question after reading? We answer every inquiry before you make the trip.

cta.headline: We Answer First. You Book When You're Ready.
cta.body: Send us a message describing your situation. We will confirm in plain English what we can do, what documents you will need, and what to expect — before you make the appointment.
